response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON provided lyrics for 'Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!', however the video features the song 'Draw.'. Consequently, the JSON lyrics were ignored. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded reference lyrics due to song mismatch. Manual transcription was performed using on-screen lyrics and native audio perception. 3. Timing & Pacing: Dialogue subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal bursts. Song subtitles are synchronized with vocal delivery, using on-screen lyrics as the primary guide.

subtitles.original: Cheki-style photo with hand-written message signed!
subtitles.english: Cheki-style photo with hand-written message signed!

subtitles.original: お、こちらは直筆サイン入りのチェキ風ブロマイドカードがフルセットについてきます
subtitles.english:
Oh, this is an autographed cheki-style bromide
card that comes with the full set.

subtitles.original: イェー、すごーい！
And cheki-style bro... bromide... English 難しい！
subtitles.english: And cheki-style bro... bromide... English is hard!

subtitles.original: English 難しかった！
難しい！ディフィカルト・イングリッシュ！
With foil-stamped repro... repro... repro...
I can't talk anymore! Signature! Whoo!
subtitles.english: I can't talk anymore! Signature! Whoo!

subtitles.original: ちなみにサインは数量限定となっております
subtitles.english:
By the way, the signature version is
limited in quantity.

subtitles.original: はい、お願いします！お願いします！
So here's the full set again, so please go check it out everyone! Thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english:
So here's the full set again, so please go check
it out everyone! Thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: And that was the merch lineup for Raora Panthera's Birthday Celebration 2026! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english:
And that was the merch lineup for Raora Panthera's
Birthday Celebration 2026! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: ミオ先輩、おかゆ先輩、Thank you so much for your support! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english:
Mio-senpai, Okayu-senpai, thank you so much
for your support! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: こちらこそ！お疲れ様！
上手くフォロー出来てたかな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if I was able to follow along well.

subtitles.original: どうかな？
出来てたかな？
Thank you!
でも凄く楽しかったです！
Yes, yes, 凄くハッピー！
楽しかった！
ありがとう、嬉しい！
Alright, now the merch announcement is done...
subtitles.english: Alright, now the merch announcement is done...

subtitles.original: The next song will be the last one. 最後！
subtitles.english: The next song will be the last one. The end!

subtitles.original: Last one! 最後！
Last song! Whoo!
楽しみ！
I'm kind of nervous... push for me okay, senpais?
subtitles.english: I'm kind of nervous... support me okay, senpais?

subtitles.original: オッケー、オッケー！頑張れ、頑張れ！
頑張れ、ラオーラ！ファイト、ラオーラ！
subtitles.english: Go for it, Raora! Fight, Raora!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！じゃあ、バイバイ！Let's say goodbye!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Well then, bye-bye! Let's say goodbye!

subtitles.original: オッケー！
バイバーイ！

Draw.
Lyrics, Music Arrangement: OrcaNyan
夢のぬくもりと
subtitles.english: With the warmth of a dream

subtitles.original: 指先に絵の具の匂い
subtitles.english: The scent of paint on my fingertips

subtitles.original: 湿ったキャンバスの上には
まだ知らない色が息をする
subtitles.english: Colors I don't know yet breathe

subtitles.original: All the pieces I picked up
subtitles.english: All the pieces I picked up

subtitles.original: Unravel in my own chest
“It's okay,” I whisper softly
Saving it back to myself
迷いも震えも
隠さなくていいから
subtitles.english: You don't have to hide them

subtitles.original: この線の全部が私へ続く
subtitles.english: All these lines lead to me

subtitles.original: I'm drawing out my true color
subtitles.english: I'm drawing out my true color

subtitles.original: 滲んだ輪郭も
淡く、脆く、煌めいて
形になってゆくの
夜明けの面影に
集めた色を重ね
Draw it slow, draw it true
subtitles.english: Draw it slow, draw it true

subtitles.original: 夜明けの夢現
微睡みに余白の答え
subtitles.english: The answer in the blank space of a slumber

subtitles.original: 白いページに色が咲いていく
息づいた景色を描き出す
subtitles.english: Drawing out a landscape that has come to life

subtitles.original: All the colors I held back
subtitles.english: All the colors I held back

subtitles.original: Start to gather in the hush
subtitles.english: Start to gather in the hush

subtitles.original: “It's all right,” the first light tells me
subtitles.english: “It's all right,” the first light tells me

subtitles.original: Sending warmth into my heart
願いも希望も
隠さなくていいんだよ
subtitles.english: You don't have to hide them

subtitles.original: ほら、ありのままの私を描く
subtitles.english: See, I'm drawing my true self
